original_statement: how many championships ernie els won?
mutated_statement: how many championships a golfer must both have won and not have won?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Modal/tense change] + [Negation/contradiction insertion] + [Specificity removal]: Proper name "ernie els" → generic "a golfer" | factual past-tense "won" → modal necessity "must have won" | added negation "and not have won" creating a logical contradiction and shifting from factual query to hypothetical/paradox (how many championships ernie els won? → how many championships a golfer must both have won and not have won?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 可见代理把变异问题解读为“有多少人赢/未赢冠军”，并给出“4|3”的计数与解释（列出赢冠军和未赢的高尔夫球手），未提及“必须既赢又未赢”的逻辑矛盾。代理在执行链（simple_query）中直接按表格字段计数，表现为对矛盾/否定项不做语义层面的识别或澄清，而是形式化地完成统计任务。由于代理既未拒绝、也未询问澄清，且未对互斥条件做任何修正或合理化，故归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾（形式化执行而非语义澄清）”。
